title: Copy of Portland theme
description: Changes the theme of your GUI to dark
body:
[==========================================================================]

[ENG] Changes the theme of your GUI to dark.
Here is a list of mods affected by the resource pack:
Axiom,
Boat Hud,
Item Swapper,
JGUI (for replay mod),
Mod Menu,
Replay Mod

[==========================================================================]

[RU] Меняет тему вашего GUI на темную.
Вот список модов на которые влияет ресурспак:
Axiom,
Boat Hud,
Item Swapper,
JGUI (для Replay Mod),
Mod Menu,
Replay Mod

[==========================================================================]
